hero.title: Frontend Engineer
hero.subtitle: I build fast, accessible, and well-architected interfaces.

about.title: About me
about.body: I'm a Frontend Engineer passionate about performance and design systems. I started self-teaching in 2021, studied at Alura, enrolled in a Computer Science degree, and today I work as a Frontend Engineer intern. I was also a programming and robotics instructor at Ctrl+Play — an experience that taught me as much as writing code.
